overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a samurai warrior exploring a moonlit geothermal hot spring at night, wading through turquoise water surrounded by steam vents, rocky formations, and bathing monkeys.

scene_state.functional_zone: open geothermal hot spring pool with steam vents

agents.ego_description: samurai character wading slowly through waist-deep turquoise hot spring water

notable_agents.action: monkeys sitting on rocks bathing in the hot spring steam

entered.detail: tall plumes of white steam rising from geothermal vents in the water
large dark boulders rising from the water with monkeys resting on top
bright full moon illuminating the night sky above the steam

segments.scene_description: The samurai stands in a moonlit hot spring surrounded by rising steam vents. Monkeys bathe on rocks to the right while the character begins wading forward through the turquoise water toward the misty center of the pool.

scene_state.functional_zone: hot spring approaching stone shrine structure

events.description: character moves past the main steam vents, steam density decreases significantly

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade through water toward a stone shrine structure with a tree

notable_agents.action: monkeys sitting on rocks near the water's edge watching the character

entered.detail: traditional stone shrine with stacked rocks on a platform in the water
tree with white flowers growing on a rock outcrop near the shrine

segments.scene_description: Moving past the dense steam vents, the character approaches a stone shrine structure with a white blossoming tree. The monkeys remain visible on the right as the water depth stays consistent and the environment becomes more rocky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow water passage between rocky outcrops

events.description: character turns left to navigate around the stone shrine structure

agents.ego_description: navigating around the stone shrine and through narrower channels between rocks

entered.detail: rocky bank rising steeply from the water's edge on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the stone shrine, passing the white blossom tree closely on the left. The environment narrows between rocky outcrops, and the steam vents now appear in the distance on the left as the character moves through the channel.

scene_state.functional_zone: open hot spring pool approaching distant grassy shore

agents.ego_description: walking through open water toward the distant shoreline and grassy terrain

entered.detail: grassy hills and terrain visible in the distance beyond the water
large boulder formation along the right water's edge

segments.scene_description: Entering a more open area of the hot spring, the character wades toward a distant grassy shore visible under the moonlight. The rocky terrain falls behind on the right as the water stretches toward the dark hills in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit geothermal spring that transitions from a steamy bathing area into a narrow rocky channel and finally toward an open shoreline. It begins with the samurai wading through turquoise water amidst rising steam vents and bathing monkeys perched on the rocks to the right. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts toward a stone shrine and a white blossoming tree, with the environment becoming increasingly rocky. The camera then circles the shrine and passes closely by the blossoms, narrowing into a channel between rocky outcrops as the steam vents recede into the distance. Finally, the terrain opens up again, leaving the rocks behind as the character wades toward a distant grassy shore and dark hills under the moonlight.
